c.d: The app uses a true random algorithm or quantum random number generator to shuffle songs without repeating them frequently.
Intelligent shuffle mode that prevents replaying the same songs soon and can adapt to user preferences dynamically.
c.s: REAL Shuffle Player[1], Spotify Smart Shuffle[2]

c.d: Ability to create, modify, and link playlists, including features like folder-based playlists and linked playlists.
Supports streaming music from cloud platforms or online sources like YouTube, OneDrive, Google Drive.
Number of downloads or active users indicating app popularity.
Average user rating score indicating user satisfaction and app quality.
Whether the app is ad-supported or ad-free, impacting user experience during playback.
Availability across different devices and operating systems.
